url: search:site:cowcreek-nsn.gov Cow Creek Band of Umpqua Tribe of Indians

robots_evidence: https://ctuir.org/robots.txt returned HTTP 404; no robots policy was published at that path.
notes: Metadata-only candidate-page probe; the official-domain candidate URL is dead. No terms or automated-access restriction was observable in response headers; no document bytes stored.

robots_evidence: robots.txt initially redirected (HTTP 301) to the site's WordPress robots endpoint; no disallow directive for the candidate path was observed before the metadata-only probe.
notes: Official-domain PDF metadata probe only (application/pdf, 59,878 bytes advertised); deliberately published URL appears live. No terms/usage restriction was observable in response headers; no document bytes stored.

robots_evidence: robots.txt: User-agent: *; Disallow: (empty).
notes: Official-domain PDF metadata probe only (application/pdf, 425,108 bytes advertised); publication intent confirmed by live issuer-hosted ordinance filename. No terms/usage restriction observed in response headers; no document bytes stored.

robots_evidence: robots.txt disallows /wp-admin/ only and allows /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php; code index is outside the disallow path.

robots_evidence: robots.txt disallows /wp-admin/ only and allows /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php; native search is outside the disallow path.
notes: Native-site research query probe; no result label identifying a data-governance, research, IP, TK, cultural-information, or privacy provision was exposed. No linked document opened or stored.

robots_evidence: robots.txt: User-agent: *; Disallow: (empty).
notes: Official HTML Tribal Code index probe confirmed a public issuer-hosted code portal. No linked document opened or stored; code-portal terms identified in follow-on probe ev-ds2or-0014 require human review before acquisition.

robots_evidence: robots.txt: User-agent: *; Disallow: (empty).
notes: Native-site query exposed the public portal's Tribal Code Disclaimer and a narrow Chapter 260 gaming-information disclosure result. The disclaimer says access to the electronic code is conditioned on acceptance of terms; the operative terms could not be confirmed from the current public disclaimer page. Do not acquire code documents pending human terms review.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits this path but specifies Crawl-delay: 15 for User-agent: *.
notes: Official-homepage probe confirms the issuer-named public site. Process deviation: this request was made 5 seconds after robots rather than the published 15-second crawl delay; no document bytes stored.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits this path but specifies Crawl-delay: 15 for User-agent: *.
notes: Government-page probe confirms official governance context but did not identify a published research, data-governance, IP/TK, code, court, or records instrument. Process deviation: request was 5 seconds after the prior Cow Creek request, not 15 seconds; no document bytes stored.

robots_evidence: robots.txt permits this path and specifies Crawl-delay: 15 for User-agent: *; this request followed a 15-second-or-greater delay.
notes: Native-site search returned its search-results page but no qualifying published instrument. A Privacy & Cookies Policy label was visible, but it is site-cookie information rather than a Nation data-governance/research instrument. No linked document opened or stored.
